ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Obligo particolare d`alcuni academici in materia di danari
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Names appearing on the document, and subscribing to financial contributions: `Giovanni Badoer, Alvise Badoer, Giovanni Badoer, Morlopino Abate, Urbano Morlopino fratello, Camillo Besalio, Luciano Pellerio, Antonio Girardi.`
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
